info.title: SalesCaptain API Documentation Service
info.description:
API Documentation Service for SalesCaptain platform.
This service provides endpoints for managing and retrieving company information for API documentation purposes.

get.description: Returns basic service information and health status

Retrieves a list of companies associated with the authenticated user's accounts.
This endpoint fetches company information from the main SalesCaptain API based on 
the company IDs associated with the user's accounts.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific company by its unique identifier.

get.summary: Fetch all accounts for authenticated user
get.description:
Retrieves a list of all accounts associated with the authenticated user.
Returns account details including access level, contact information, and last login time.

Retrieves detailed information about a specific account by its unique identifier.
Returns account details including access level, contact information, and last login time.

get.summary: List conversation profiles for a company
get.description:
Retrieves all conversation profiles associated with a specific company.
Conversation profiles represent communication channels like phone lines, email addresses, etc.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific conversation profile by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: conversation_profile_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the conversation profile

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of conversations associated with a specific company.
Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination options.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (must be a positive integer)

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (10-100, default 10)

data.last_message: Hey, I need help with my order

value.message: Please provide a valid page_number (must be a positive integer)
sort_by must be one of: last_update
filter must be one of: conversation_profile_id, number, email, chat_status
company_id is required!

get.summary: Fetch a single conversation by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific conversation by its unique identifier.

data.last_message: Hey, I need help with my order

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of messages for a specific conversation within a company.
Supports sorting by created_at and pagination options.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (must be a positive integer)

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (10-100, default 10)

200.description: Messages fetched successfully or error response

value.message: Messages fetched successfully!

value.error: {"is_error":true,"error":"company_id and conversation_id must be provided!","message":"company_id and conversation_id must be provided!"}
value.message: {"is_error":true,"error":"company_id and conversation_id must be provided!","message":"company_id and conversation_id must be provided!"}

value.error: {"is_error":true,"error":"page and items_per_page are required","message":"page and items_per_page are required"}
value.message: {"is_error":true,"error":"page and items_per_page are required","message":"page and items_per_page are required"}
{"is_error":true,"error":"Conversation not found","message":"Conversation not found"}
Company not found
connect ECONNREFUSED

get.summary: Fetch a single message by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific message by its unique identifier.

200.description: Message fetched successfully or error response

value.message: Message fetched successfully!

value.error: {"is_error":true,"error":"message_id must be provided!","message":"message_id must be provided!"}
value.message: {"is_error":true,"error":"message_id must be provided!","message":"message_id must be provided!"}
{"is_error":true,"error":"Message not found","message":"Message not found"}
{"is_error":true,"error":"Conversation not found","message":"Conversation not found"}
Company not found
connect ECONNREFUSED

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of contacts associated with a specific company.
Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination options.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (must be a positive integer)

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (10-100, default 10)

value.message: Please provide a valid page_number (must be a positive integer)
sort_by must be one of: name, number, email, created_at
filter must be one of: phone, email, facebook, instagram, whatsapp

get.summary: Fetch a single contact by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific contact by its unique identifier.

post.description:
Creates a new contact for a specific company.
At least one of contact_phone or contact_email must be provided.
User must have 'contacts' access role to create contacts.

contact_phone.description: Phone number of the contact (required if no email provided)

contact_email.description: Email address of the contact (required if no phone provided)

custom_fields.description: Optional list of custom fields to set for the contact

with_both.summary: Contact with both phone and email

value.message: company_id is required!

value.error: Either phone or email must be provided!
value.message: Either phone or email must be provided!

example.error: You don't have permission to create contact!
example.message: You don't have permission to create contact!

example.error: Contact with this phone already exists!
example.message: Contact with this phone already exists!

put.description:
Updates an existing contact's information.
At least one of name, phone, email, or custom_fields must be provided.
User must have 'contacts' access role to update contacts.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the contact to update

phone.description: Updated phone number (set to empty string to remove)

email.description: Updated email address (set to empty string to remove)

value.message: company_id is required
At least one of name, phone, email, or custom_fields must be provided
phone must be a valid phone number (e.g., +14155551234)
email must be a valid email address

example.error: You don't have permission to update contact!
example.message: You don't have permission to update contact!

value.error: Contact with this phone already exists!
value.message: Contact with this phone already exists!

value.error: Contact with this email already exists!
value.message: Contact with this email already exists!

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a contact from the system.
User must have 'contacts' access role to delete contacts.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the contact to delete

example.error: You don't have permission to delete contact!
example.message: You don't have permission to delete contact!

get.summary: List all custom fields for a company
get.description:
Retrieves all custom field definitions associated with a specific company.
Custom fields allow companies to store additional contact information.

get.summary: Get a single custom field by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific custom field definition by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: custom_field_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the custom field

BearerAuth.description:
Authentication token required for accessing protected endpoints.
The token should be obtained from the main SalesCaptain authentication service.

path.description: API endpoint path where the error occurred

accounts.description: List of accounts associated with the user

permissions.description: List of permissions for this account

access_level.description: User's access level within the account

last_login.description: Timestamp of the user's last login

ConversationProfile.description: Conversation profile representing a communication channel

conversation_profile_id.description: Unique identifier for the conversation profile

name.description: Display name for the conversation profile

number.description: Phone number associated with the profile (null if not applicable)

email.description: Email address associated with the profile

color.description: Hex color code for UI display

created_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated

tags.description: List of tags associated with the contact

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields for the contact

conversation_profile_id.description: Unique identifier for the conversation profile

conversation_profile_number.description: Phone number of the conversation profile

conversation_profile_email.description: Email address of the conversation profile

last_message.description: Content of the last message in the conversation
last_message.example: Hey, I need help with my order

assigned_to.description: Account ID of the assigned agent (null if unassigned)

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated

created_at.description: Timestamp when the conversation was created

seen_by.description: Account ID of the last agent who viewed the conversation (null if unseen)

is_chat_opened.description: Whether the chat is currently open

conversation_profile_id.description: Unique identifier for the conversation profile

conversation_profile_email.description: Email address of the conversation profile

conversation_profile_number.description: Phone number of the conversation profile

type_of_message.description: Type of the message (e.g., sms_message, email_message, etc.)

assigned_account_id.description: Account ID of the agent assigned at the time of the message

created_at.description: Timestamp when the message was created

FailureResponse.description: Standard failure response returned with HTTP 200 status

CustomFieldInput.description: Custom field input for create/update operations

cf_id.description: Unique identifier of the custom field

cf_value.description: Value to set for the custom field

total_count.description: Total number of items across all pages

created_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields for the contact

cf_id.description: Unique identifier for the custom field

cf_name.description: Internal name of the custom field (lowercase, no spaces)

cf_label.description: Display label for the custom field

cf_datatype.description: Data type of the custom field

cf_description.description: Description of the custom field's purpose

created_at.description: Timestamp when the custom field was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the custom field was last updated

UnauthorizedError.description: Authentication token is missing or invalid

ForbiddenError.description: Access forbidden - valid token but insufficient permissions

example.error: Too many requests, please try again later

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Time when the rate limit resets

value.message: Companies fetched successfully!
